---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
title-block-banner: false

listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

::: {.homepage}

# Kareem Nayfeh

Things I find interesting or useful about engineering.

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}

:::

:::
